headline: EU parliament greenlights digital euro
summary: EU lawmakers on Thursday backed kickstarting negotiations on creating a digital version of the euro, as the European Union races to introduce the currency.EU lawmaker Fernando Navarrete Rojas, one of the lead negotiators for the parliament, insisted the digital euro was "an alternative, not a requirement".

raw.headline: EU parliament greenlights digital euro
raw.summary: EU lawmakers on Thursday backed kickstarting negotiations on creating a digital version of the euro, as the European Union races to introduce the currency.EU lawmaker Fernando Navarrete Rojas, one of the lead negotiators for the parliament, insisted the digital euro was "an alternative, not a requirement".

headline: Visa (V) Is Being Pulled Into The Stablecoin Conversation. What’s Going On With The Stock?
summary: Visa Inc. (NYSE:V) is one of the 12 Best Dow Stocks to Invest In Right Now. On July 3, Matthew O’Neill of Bank of America Securities reiterated a Buy rating on Visa Inc. (NYSE:V) and set a target price of $410. The firm’s assigned price target implies a further 13% upside from current levels. This […]

headline: 1 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks with Exciting Potential and 2 We Avoid
summary: The stocks in this article have caught Wall Street’s attention in a big way, with price targets implying returns above 20%. But investors should take these forecasts with a grain of salt because analysts typically say nice things about companies so their firms can win business in other product lines like M&A advisory.

headline: Mastercard (MA) Launches AP4M To Bring AI Agent Payments Onchain
summary: Mastercard (NYSE:MA) has launched Agent Pay for Machines (AP4M), a platform for secure payments between AI agents. The AP4M system connects traditional payment networks with stablecoin settlement on public blockchains. The launch brings together credentialed identity frameworks and partnerships with major fintech players to support autonomous transactions. For investors watching how payments evolve beyond cards and phones, Mastercard is pushing into machine to machine commerce with AP4M...

headline: Mastercard Vs PayPal: Barclays Sees Big Upside In Only One Payments Stock
summary: Barclays analyst Nik Cremo initiated coverage of both Mastercard and PayPal stocks on Wednesday.

headline: Mastercard Built the Rails for Agent-to-Agent Payments. Now It Needs the Traffic.
summary: Agent Pay for Machines is the first infrastructure designed for machine-to-machine commerce at scale. But there's no public audit of actual agent transaction volume — and the gap between rails and riders is the story.

raw.headline: Mastercard Built the Rails for Agent-to-Agent Payments. Now It Needs the Traffic.
raw.summary: Agent Pay for Machines is the first infrastructure designed for machine-to-machine commerce at scale. But there's no public audit of actual agent transaction volume — and the gap between rails and riders is the story.

headline: Fundsmith Equity Fund: H1 2026 Purchases
summary: Fundsmith Equity Fund was down by 2.9% in the first 6 months of the year, 14.1 percentage points less than what is perhaps the most obvious comparator, the MSCI World Index (Â£ net).
